chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-243 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of M.A No.1145/26. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2026. Syed Sajjad Ali Shah, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional Prosecutor General for the State. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G, Sindh alongwith Inspector / I.O Muhammad Iqbal from PS Peeromal, District Sanghar and SIP Noroo Mal from PS Sultanabad. ***************************************** Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Hingoro, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.9, which is taken on record. Petitioners are present along with their counsel. Petitioner No.1 has categorically made a statement before this Court that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 on her own freewill and choice without any pressure or coercion. She has further stated that neither she has been kidnapped nor abducted as alleged in the FIR No.05 of 2026 under Section 364, 506/2, 337A(i), 337F(i), 34 P.P.C, at Police Station Peromal District Sanghar Today I.O of the case is present in Court and has recorded the Statement under Section 161 Cr.P.C of Petitioner No.1 (Sht. Jameelan) wherein she has reiterated the facts as stated hereinabove. I.O states that he shall file report before the concerned Magistrate under Section 173 Cr.P.C. He shall do so within seven days from today. The concerned Magistrate shall pass orders in accordance with law on the report so submitted by the I.O. As far as the grievance of the private respondents, if any, is concerned, they are at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of their grievance, if so

The concerned Magistrate shall pass orders in accordance with law on the report so submitted by the I.O. As far as the grievance of the private respondents, if any, is concerned, they are at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of their grievance, if so Page 2 of 2 advised. In the meantime, legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners as and when required. This Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
